response: Japan, a country with a population of 125 million, has a $4.2 trillion GDP that expanded by 1.1% annually, paired with a strong labor market featuring 2.6% unemployment and a 3.2% inflation rate. Despite holding a notably high 263% debt-to-GDP ratio, Japan boasts an exceptional life expectancy of 84.6 years and records annual exports totaling $756 billion.
